title: Cross-App Recommendation Logic
language_app_rules: If vocabulary accuracy drops, recommend story or conversation activities using those words.
If conversation mastery stalls, recommend translation-reveal mode before shadowing mode.
If reading strength rises, unlock longer stories or harder CEFR layers.
testing_app_rules: If time is weak but accuracy is decent, recommend timed mode.
If high-confidence wrong answers rise, recommend strategy scenarios before more volume.
If one exam section is clearly weakest, bias next session toward that section.
shared_rules: Use coins and streaks to surface motivating but useful next tasks.
Alternate harder and easier modes to avoid burnout.
